payload.source_text: The pocket money tracker system allows children to claim pocket money tasks as they are completed throughout the week.
Parents can detail tasks that should be completed and the monetary amount earned for that task.
As a task is completed it is linked to the child that completed it.
The children should be able to see the available tasks and the tasks they have completed that week.
At the end of each week the children can see the total amount they have earned that week.
The Parents can also see a report of how much each child has earned and the tasks they completed so that they can provide the pocket money earned to each child.
At the start of the next week all tasks become available again to be claimed.
Historical task data shall be available.
The resulting system shall be able to operate on iOS 16, Android 9 and Windows 11 or later.

payload.completeness_rule: This register SHALL contain the identifiers of ALL Source elements present in the ledger.

payload.evaluated_scope: All input material in this project

original_descriptions: Pocket money task with completion status
Enable children to claim completed pocket money tasks throughout the week
Provide children visibility into available task opportunities and completed work
Enable parents to fulfill accountability and payment obligations through reporting
Support accountability through historical tracking capability

payload.completeness_rule: This register SHALL contain the identifiers of ALL ZachmanCell elements present in the ledger.

payload.description: Task claiming process
payload.justification: Claiming completed tasks is a core process the enterprise performs - strategic business function

payload.description: Reward structure definition process
payload.justification: Defining task-based rewards is a strategic process performed by parents in the enterprise

payload.description: Accountability reporting process
payload.justification: Reporting for accountability and payment is a strategic process fulfilling parental obligations

payload.description: Task-based monetary reward structure with completion status tracking
payload.justification: Tasks are central entities referenced as claimable items and completed work - strategically important thing | Reward structure is the entity parents define linking tasks to monetary value - strategic data thing

payload.description: Weekly earnings record
payload.justification: Earnings achievement tracked weekly is a strategic entity representing financial accumulation

payload.description: Historical activity record
payload.justification: Historical tracking implies entity of past records supporting accountability - strategically important for continuity

payload.description: Weekly earnings cycle
payload.justification: Signals reference weekly timeframe for task claiming and earnings achievement - strategic temporal cycle

payload.description: Child as task claimer and earnings viewer
payload.justification: Multiple signals reference children as primary actors claiming tasks, viewing opportunities, and understanding earnings

payload.description: Parent as task definer and payment obligor
payload.justification: Signals establish parents as actors defining rewards and fulfilling payment obligations through reporting

payload.description: Enable children to view available task opportunities, claim completed pocket money tasks, and track their completed work throughout the week
payload.justification: Signal explicitly articulates core purpose of enabling task claiming by children - direct strategic goal statement | Signal expresses goal of transparency and visibility for child users - strategic objective for information access

payload.description: Enable parents to define task-based monetary reward structures
payload.justification: Signal establishes parental motivation to create reward structures - clear strategic goal for parent stakeholder

payload.description: Enable children to understand their weekly earnings achievement
payload.justification: Signal captures objective of earnings comprehension - strategic goal for financial literacy and progress awareness

payload.description: Support accountability and payment obligations through historical tracking and reporting capability
payload.justification: Signal defines parental need for reporting to meet obligations - clear strategic goal for accountability | Signal indicates requirement for historical tracking with accountability objective - strategic goal for auditability and trust

payload.completeness_rule: This register SHALL contain the identifiers of ALL CellContentItem elements present in the ledger.

payload.name: Family Participation Structure
payload.description: Defines the roles, rights, and obligations of family members within the household economic framework, establishing who may propose work, who may claim opportunities, and the relational accountability between participants.

payload.name: Work-Value Exchange Governance
payload.description: Establishes the enterprise commitment to define, communicate, and maintain the economic exchange relationship between contributed effort and monetary compensation, including the authority to set and modify reward structures.

payload.name: Earnings Transparency Obligation
payload.description: Governs the enterprise responsibility to provide participants with visibility into their economic performance, achievement status, and accumulated compensation within defined temporal boundaries.

payload.name: Accountability Record Stewardship
payload.description: Defines the enterprise obligation to preserve verifiable evidence of commitments made, work performed, and obligations discharged, enabling retrospective verification and dispute resolution.

payload.completeness_rule: This register SHALL contain the identifiers of ALL Domain elements present in the ledger.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall establish a process by which proposed work opportunities are claimed by eligible participants.
payload.rationale: The task claiming process is a core enterprise capability that enables the allocation of work opportunities within the family participation structure.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall recognise children as participants entitled to claim work opportunities and view associated earnings.
payload.rationale: Defines the structural relationship between the enterprise and child participants, establishing their roles and entitlements within the family economic framework.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall recognise parents as participants accountable for defining work opportunities and fulfilling payment obligations.
payload.rationale: Defines the structural relationship between the enterprise and parent participants, establishing their responsibilities for work definition and payment within the family economic framework.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall establish the authority to define task-based monetary reward structures.
payload.rationale: Why-column goal content expressing enterprise commitment to enable reward structure definition, combined with How-column process authority. Both CCIs express a single governance obligation: establishing the authority and means by which reward structures are defined.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall maintain a task-based monetary reward structure.
payload.rationale: What-column entity content expressing enterprise accountability for maintaining the economic exchange relationship defined in the domain. Structural recursion on the reward structure entity: completion status tracking is a constituent attribute, addressed in a separate structural requirement.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall recognise completion status as an attribute of task-based monetary rewards.
payload.rationale: Structural recursion from the reward structure entity in CCI-ROW1-C-What-001. The CCI explicitly identifies completion status tracking as part of the reward structure, warranting a dedicated structural assertion at enterprise scope.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall maintain weekly earnings records for participants.
payload.rationale: The enterprise is accountable for maintaining earnings records on a weekly cycle, establishing the temporal boundary for economic performance tracking.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall provide participants with visibility into available task opportunities.
payload.rationale: Derived from the goal to enable children to view available task opportunities, establishing an enterprise commitment to transparency.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall enable participants to claim completed tasks.
payload.rationale: Distinct obligation within the broader transparency goal, focused on participant agency in task completion acknowledgment.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall provide participants with visibility into their completed work throughout the earnings cycle.
payload.rationale: Enterprise commitment to ongoing transparency within the weekly temporal boundary, enabling tracking throughout the cycle.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall enable participants to understand their weekly earnings achievement.
payload.rationale: Enterprise obligation to provide comprehensible visibility into economic performance at the weekly aggregation level.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall maintain records of historical activity.
payload.rationale: Establishes the enterprise obligation to preserve historical activity records as verifiable evidence, directly supporting the domain's commitment to accountability record stewardship.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall establish an accountability reporting process.
payload.rationale: Derives from the How-column CCI specifying the process by which the enterprise reports on accountability matters.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall provide capability to support accountability and payment obligations through historical tracking and reporting.
payload.rationale: Articulates the enterprise-level goal as a functional commitment. The Why-column content expresses a capability the enterprise must enable, not merely a policy constraint, thus warranting Functional classification despite its motivational origin.

payload.completeness_rule: This register SHALL contain the identifiers of ALL Requirement elements present in the ledger.

payload.description: Section: High Level Description

payload.description: Articulates the core purpose of enabling children to claim completed pocket money tasks throughout the week.

Expresses goal of providing children visibility into available opportunities and completed work.
Captures objective of enabling children to understand weekly earnings achievement.
Defines parental need for reporting to fulfill accountability and payment obligations.
Indicates requirement for historical tracking to support accountability or continuity objectives.
